headline: Comparably Announces 2026 Best Company Outlook, Companies for Women, and Companies for Diversity Awards
summary: VANCOUVER, Wash., March 10, 2026--Comparably (a ZoomInfo company), a leading employee review platform for workplace culture and compensation, announced the winners of its 2026 Best Company Outlook, Best Companies for Women, and Best Companies for Diversity Awards. The awards highlight organizations that employees rate highest across nearly 20 core culture metrics — including future business confidence, eNPS, compensation, career growth, leadership, and work environment.
